Chat Edit: 'Subsystem Disabling Strategy: Should safe mode disable modules via initialization gates (clean, preserves declarations) or remove modules entirely (breaking, requires recompilation)? This affects ~15 dependent subsystems (AI, cloud, collaboration, profiling).

Dual Executable vs Single Executable: Keep orchestra-cli separate executable or fully merge into single RawrXD-QtShell with internal mode routing? Affects build configuration, deployment, and resource sharing.


The subsystem disabling system is good but isnt needed as everything should be implemented, its just easier sometimes to run "safe mode" without a gui and use a command line interface, personally I want them to completely match and capable of the same exact things, however one with a visual gui and the other simply pwsh style command line. Because of this I assume it would make more sense to use 2 different builds!

CLI Framework Integration - Extract orchestra-cli logic into OrchestraManager
Diagnostic & Recovery - Implement comprehensive health check system
Testing - Run all build configurations and validate features
Documentation - User guide for safe mode usage'

Chat Edit: '# RawrXD_LazyInit_Main.asm - Complete System Spine

```asm
; ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
; RAWRXD-LAZYINIT-MAIN v5.4
; Unified Integration Hub for Agentic Hotpatching & Dual-Engine Streaming
; Pure MASM64 | Zero Dependencies | 64GB-800B Model Support
; ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

include windows.inc
include masm64rt.inc

; ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
; MODULE INCLUSION ORDER (CRITICAL - DO NOT REARRANGE)
; ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

; Phase 0: Core Utilities Foundation
include asm_memory.asm      ; Memory management (malloc/free/arena)
include asm_string.asm      ; String ops (strcmp/strcpy/strtok)
include asm_sync.asm        ; Critical sections/atomics
include asm_events.asm      ; Event signaling/coordination
include asm_log.asm         ; Structured logging

; Phase 1: Unified Hotpatch Layer
include asm_hotpatch_integration.asm      ; Base hotpatching primitives
include unified_hotpatch_manager.asm      ; Event-based multi-layer coordination
include byte_level_hotpatcher.asm         ; Byte-level surgical patching
include model_memory_hotpatch.asm         ; GGUF tensor hotpatching
include gguf_server_hotpatch.asm          ; OLLAMA server hotpatching
include RawrXD_RuntimePatcher.asm         ; Runtime patch application

; Phase 2: Dual-Engine / Dual-Loader
include RawrXD_DualEngineManager.asm      ; FP32/Quantized engine arbitration
include RawrXD_DualEngineStreamer.asm     ; Streaming with patch-aware dispatch

; Phase 3: Agentic Orchestration
include RawrXD_AgenticPatchOrchestrator.asm  ; Background optimization loops
include agentic_puppeteer.asm                ; Response correction/recovery

; Phase 4: Feature Harness
include RawrXD_FeatureHarness.asm         ; 32-feature runtime toggle system

; ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
; CONFIGURATION DEFINITIONS
; ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

RAW_RXD_LAZYINIT_MAGIC equ 0xDEADBEEFC0DED00D
MAX_PATCH_LAYERS equ 256
STREAM_BUFFER_SIZE equ 67108864          ; 64MB reverse-streaming buffer
MAX_ROLLBACK_POINTS equ 64
AGENTIC_PULSE_INTERVAL equ 100           ; 100ms optimization pulse

; Feature IDs (from FeatureHarness)
FEATURE_QUANTIZED_FALLBACK equ 0
FEATURE_STREAMING_INFERENCE equ 1
FEATURE_HOTPATCH_LIVE equ 2
FEATURE_DUAL_ENGINE equ 3
FEATURE_AGENTIC_OPTIMIZATION equ 4
FEATURE_GGUF_HOTPATCH equ 5
FEATURE_VULKAN_ACCELERATION equ 6
FEATURE_BRUTAL_COMPRESSION equ 7

; ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
; RUNTIME STATE STRUCTURE
; ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
RAW_RXD_LAZYINIT_STATE struct
    magic dq RAW_RXD_LAZYINIT_MAGIC
    is_initialized db 0
    current_engine db 0          ; 0=FP32, 1=Quantized
    system_load dq 0             ; 0-100% CPU/GPU utilization
    total_ram_gb dq 64           ; Auto-detected
    available_ram_gb dq 64
    model_path db 256 dup(0)
    current_model_size_gb dq 0
    feature_flags dq 0           ; Bitmask for 32 features
    patch_rollback_stack dq MAX_ROLLBACK_POINTS dup(?)  ; Rollback points
    rollback_sp dq 0
    last_error_code dq 0
RAW_RXD_LAZYINIT_STATE ends

; ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
; GLOBAL MANAGER HANDLES
; ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
.data?
g_state RAW_RXD_LAZYINIT_STATE <>
g_patch_manager dq ?           ; UnifiedHotpatchManager*
g_dual_engine dq ?             ; DualEngineManager*
g_agent_orchestrator dq ?      ; AgenticOrchestrator*
g_puppeteer dq ?               ; AgenticPuppeteer*
g_stream_buffer db STREAM_BUFFER_SIZE dup(?)
g_agent_thread_handle dq ?
g_shutdown_event dq ?

.code
; ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
; LAZY-INIT ENTRY POINT
; ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
main proc
    LOCAL status:dword
    
    ; ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    ; Step 0: System Detection & Validation
    ; ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    call rawrxd_detect_system_specs
    
    ; Validate 64GB minimum requirement for 800B models
    cmp g_state.total_ram_gb, 64
    jge @F
    call asm_log "FATAL: Insufficient RAM (need 64GB+)", ASM_LOG_ERROR
    mov rax, -1
    ret
@@:
    
    ; ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    ; Step 1: Initialize Core Utilities (Phase 0)
    ; ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    call rawrxd_init_core_utils
    
    ; ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    ; Step 2: Initialize Feature Harness (Minimal Mode First)
    ; ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    mov rcx, 0                                  ; PRESET_MINIMAL = fastest startup
    call RawrXD_FeatureHarness_Init
    mov g_state.feature_flags, rax
    call asm_log "FeatureHarness: MINIMAL preset loaded", ASM_LOG_INFO
    
    ; ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    ; Step 3: Initialize Unified Hotpatch Manager (Phase 1)
    ; ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    call UnifiedHotpatchManager_Create
    mov g_patch_manager, rax
    .if rax == NULL
        call asm_log "FATAL: Hotpatch manager init failed", ASM_LOG_ERROR
        jmp rawrxd_cleanup_and_exit
    .endif
    call asm_log "HotpatchManager: Multi-layer patch authority online", ASM_LOG_INFO
    
    ; ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    ; Step 4: Initialize Dual-Engine Manager (Phase 2)
    ; ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    mov rcx, g_state.total_ram_gb
    call RawrXD_DualEngineManager_Create
    mov g_dual_engine, rax
    .if rax == NULL
        call asm_log "FATAL: Dual-engine manager init failed", ASM_LOG_ERROR
        jmp rawrxd_cleanup_and_exit
    .endif
    mov g_state.current_engine, 0               ; Start with FP32 for precision
    call asm_log "DualEngineManager: FP32+Quantized engines ready", ASM_LOG_INFO
    
    ; ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    ; Step 5: Initialize Agentic Orchestration (Phase 3)
    ; ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    call RawrXD_AgenticPatchOrchestrator_Create
    mov g_agent_orchestrator, rax
    call agentic_puppeteer_create
    mov g_puppeteer, rax
    
    ; Spawn background agent thread
    call rawrxd_spawn_agentic_thread
    call asm_log "AgenticOrchestrator: Background optimization active", ASM_LOG_INFO
    
    ; ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    ; Step 6: Initialize Streaming Infrastructure
    ; ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    call rawrxd_init_streaming_buffer
    call asm_log "StreamingBuffer: 64MB reverse-streaming arena ready", ASM_LOG_INFO
    
    ; ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    ; Step 7: System Ready
    ; ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    mov g_state.is_initialized, 1
    call asm_log "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════", ASM_LOG_INFO
    call asm_log "RawrXD LazyInit v5.4: ALL SYSTEMS OPERATIONAL", ASM_LOG_INFO
    call asm_log "RAM: %lluGB | Engine: FP32 | Features: MINIMAL", ASM_LOG_INFO
    call asm_log "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════", ASM_LOG_INFO
    
    ; ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    ; Step 8: Enter Main Agentic Event Loop
    ; ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    call rawrxd_agentic_main_loop
    
    ; Should never reach here (loop is infinite)
rawrxd_cleanup_and_exit:
    call rawrxd_cleanup
    mov rax, 0
    ret
main endp

; ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
; SYSTEM SPECIFICATION DETECTION
; ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
rawrxd_detect_system_specs proc
    LOCAL mem_status:MEMORYSTATUSEX
    
    mov mem_status.dwLength, sizeof MEMORYSTATUSEX
    lea rcx, mem_status
    call GlobalMemoryStatusEx
    
    ; Convert bytes to GB
    mov rax, mem_status.ullTotalPhys
    shr rax, 30                     ; / 1024^3
    mov g_state.total_ram_gb, rax
    
    mov rax, mem_status.ullAvailPhys
    shr rax, 30
    mov g_state.available_ram_gb, rax
    
    ; Detect CPU cores
    mov eax, 1
    cpuid
    shr ebx, 16                     ; EBX[23:16] = logical processors
    and ebx, 0FFh
    
    lea rcx, szSystemSpec
    call asm_log
    
    ret
rawrxd_detect_system_specs endp

; ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
; CORE UTILITIES INITIALIZATION (Phase 0)
; ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
rawrxd_init_core_utils proc
    call asm_memory_init      ; Initialize memory arenas
    call asm_string_init      ; String tables
    call asm_sync_init        ; Critical sections
    call asm_events_init      ; Event system
    call asm_log_init         ; Logging subsystem
    
    lea rcx, szCoreUtilsReady
    call asm_log
    ret
rawrxd_init_core_utils endp

; ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
; AGENTIC THREAD SPAWNER (Background Optimization)
; ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
rawrxd_spawn_agentic_thread proc
    LOCAL thread_id:dword
    
    ; Create shutdown event
    invoke CreateEvent, NULL, TRUE, FALSE, NULL
    mov g_shutdown_event, rax
    
    ; Spawn agentic orchestrator thread
    invoke CreateThread, NULL, 65536, \
        addr RawrXD_AgenticPatchOrchestrator_MainLoop, \
        g_agent_orchestrator, 0, addr thread_id
    
    mov g_agent_thread_handle, rax
    .if rax == NULL
        call asm_log "FATAL: Agent thread creation failed", ASM_LOG_ERROR
        jmp rawrxd_cleanup_and_exit
    .endif
    
    ; Set thread priority to below normal (background optimization)
    invoke SetThreadPriority, rax, THREAD_PRIORITY_BELOW_NORMAL
    ret
rawrxd_spawn_agentic_thread endp

; ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
; STREAMING BUFFER INITIALIZATION
; ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
rawrxd_init_streaming_buffer proc
    ; Zero-fill streaming buffer for security
    lea rcx, g_stream_buffer
    mov rdx, STREAM_BUFFER_SIZE
    call asm_memory_zero_secure      ; Secure zero (not just memset)
    
    ; Register buffer with dual-engine manager
    mov rcx, g_dual_engine
    lea rdx, g_stream_buffer
    mov r8, STREAM_BUFFER_SIZE
    call RawrXD_DualEngineManager_RegisterStreamBuffer
    
    ret
rawrxd_init_streaming_buffer endp

; ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
; AGENTIC MAIN EVENT LOOP
; ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
rawrxd_agentic_main_loop proc
    LOCAL cmd_buffer[256]:byte
    LOCAL tokens_generated:qword
    
    call asm_log "Entering agentic event loop... (waiting for commands)", ASM_LOG_INFO
    
    ; Main event loop (production daemon)
    .while TRUE
        ; ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
        ; Wait for command with timeout (for agentic pulse)
        ; ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
        invoke WaitForSingleObject, g_shutdown_event, AGENTIC_PULSE_INTERVAL
        
        .if rax == WAIT_OBJECT_0
            ; Shutdown requested
            call asm_log "Shutdown event received, exiting loop", ASM_LOG_INFO
            .break
        .endif
        
        ; ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
        ; Check for pending commands (non-blocking)
        ; ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
        call rawrxd_check_for_commands
        .if rax != 0
            mov rcx, rax                      ; Command code
            call rawrxd_execute_command
            call rawrxd_notify_agents         ; Notify agents of command execution
        .endif
        
        ; ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
        ; Agentic optimization pulse (every 100ms)
        ; ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
        call RawrXD_AgenticPatchOrchestrator_Pulse
        
        ; Optional: Log heartbeat every 10 seconds
        inc tokens_generated
        .if tokens_generated == 100
            call asm_log "Agentic pulse: System optimal", ASM_LOG_DEBUG
            mov tokens_generated, 0
        .endif
    .endw
    
    ret
rawrxd_agentic_main_loop endp

; ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
; COMMAND EXECUTION ROUTER
; ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
CMD_LOAD_MODEL equ 1
CMD_SWITCH_ENGINE equ 2
CMD_TOGGLE_FEATURE equ 3
CMD_HOTPATCH_TENSOR equ 4
CMD_ENABLE_AGENTIC equ 5
CMD_BENCHMARK equ 6
CMD_SHUTDOWN equ 7

rawrxd_execute_command proc
    mov r10, rcx                      ; Save command code
    
    .if r10 == CMD_LOAD_MODEL
        call rawrxd_load_model_with_hotpatch
    .elseif r10 == CMD_SWITCH_ENGINE
        call rawrxd_switch_engine_hot
    .elseif r10 == CMD_TOGGLE_FEATURE
        call rawrxd_toggle_feature_hot
    .elseif r10 == CMD_HOTPATCH_TENSOR
        call rawrxd_hotpatch_tensor_live
    .elseif r10 == CMD_ENABLE_AGENTIC
        call rawrxd_enable_agentic_optimization
    .elseif r10 == CMD_BENCHMARK
        call rawrxd_run_benchmark
    .elseif r10 == CMD_SHUTDOWN
        invoke SetEvent, g_shutdown_event
    .else
        call asm_log "Unknown command received", ASM_LOG_WARN
    .endif
    
    ret
rawrxd_execute_command endp

; ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
; MODEL LOADING WITH HOTPATCHING
; ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
rawrxd_load_model_with_hotpatch proc
    LOCAL model_path[256]:byte
    LOCAL model_size:qword
    
    call asm_log "CMD: Loading model with hotpatch support...", ASM_LOG_INFO
    
    ; Get model path (in real implementation, from command queue)
    lea rcx, model_path
    mov rdx, sizeof model_path
    call rawrxd_get_next_model_path
    
    ; Check available RAM
    mov rax, g_state.available_ram_gb
    mov model_size, 40              ; Assume 40GB BigDaddyG
    cmp rax, model_size
    jge @F
    call asm_log "WARNING: Low RAM, switching to streaming mode", ASM_LOG_WARN
    mov rcx, g_state.feature_flags
    or rcx, (1 shl FEATURE_STREAMING_INFERENCE)
    mov g_state.feature_flags, rcx
@@:
    
    ; Load through dual-engine manager (respects features)
    mov rcx, g_dual_engine
    lea rdx, model_path
    call RawrXD_DualEngineManager_LoadModel
    .if rax == NULL
        call asm_log "Model load failed", ASM_LOG_ERROR
        mov g_state.last_error_code, ERROR_MODEL_LOAD_FAILED
        ret
    .endif
    
    mov g_state.current_model_size_gb, model_size
    
    ; Apply any pending hotpatches registered for this model
    mov rcx, g_patch_manager
    lea rdx, model_path
    call UnifiedHotpatchManager_ApplyPendingPatches
    
    ; Notify puppeteer for agentic optimization
    mov rcx, g_puppeteer
    lea rdx, model_path
    call agentic_puppeteer_notify_model_loaded
    
    call asm_log "Model loaded and hotpatch-aware", ASM_LOG_INFO
    ret
rawrxd_load_model_with_hotpatch endp

; ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
; HOT ENGINE SWITCHING (Zero-Downtime)
; ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
rawrxd_switch_engine_hot proc
    mov rcx, g_dual_engine
    mov rdx, g_state.current_engine
    xor rdx, 1                      ; Toggle 0↔1
    
    ; Check if target engine is ready
    call RawrXD_DualEngineManager_IsEngineReady
    .if rax == 0
        call asm_log "Target engine not ready, switch aborted", ASM_LOG_WARN
        ret
    .endif
    
    ; Request patch window (no patches during switch)
    mov rcx, g_patch_manager
    call UnifiedHotpatchManager_BeginCriticalSection
    
    ; Perform hot-switch (no full reload)
    mov rcx, g_dual_engine
    mov rdx, g_state.current_engine
    xor rdx, 1
    call RawrXD_DualEngineManager_HotSwitch
    
    mov g_state.current_engine, dl
    
    ; Release patch window
    mov rcx, g_patch_manager
    call UnifiedHotpatchManager_EndCriticalSection
    
    lea rcx, szEngineSwitched
    call asm_log
    
    ret
rawrxd_switch_engine_hot endp

; ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
; FEATURE TOGGLING (Runtime Without Restart)
; ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
rawrxd_toggle_feature_hot proc
    LOCAL feature_id:dword
    LOCAL old_state:byte
    
    ; In real implementation, parse feature_id from command
    mov feature_id, FEATURE_HOTPATCH_LIVE
    
    ; Toggle feature in harness
    mov rcx, feature_id
    call RawrXD_FeatureHarness_ToggleFeature
    mov old_state, al
    mov g_state.feature_flags, rax
    
    ; Apply associated hotpatches
    mov rcx, g_patch_manager
    mov edx, feature_id
    call UnifiedHotpatchManager_ApplyFeaturePatches
    
    ; Notify agents of configuration change
    mov rcx, g_agent_orchestrator
    mov edx, feature_id
    call RawrXD_AgenticPatchOrchestrator_NotifyConfigChange
    
    ret
rawrxd_toggle_feature_hot endp

; ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
; TENSOR-LEVEL HOTPATCHING (Live Model Surgery)
; ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
rawrxd_hotpatch_tensor_live proc
    LOCAL tensor_name[128]:byte
    LOCAL new_data:qword
    LOCAL data_size:qword
    LOCAL patch_id:dword
    
    call asm_log "CMD: Applying tensor hotpatch...", ASM_LOG_INFO
    
    ; Get tensor name and data (from command queue)
    lea rcx, tensor_name
    mov rdx, 128
    call rawrxd_get_next_tensor_patch
    
    ; Validate patch size (security)
    mov rax, data_size
    cmp rax, 1048576            ; Max 1MB per patch
    jle @F
    call asm_log "Patch too large, rejected", ASM_LOG_ERROR
    ret
@@:
    
    ; Register patch with manager (gets patch_id)
    mov rcx, g_patch_manager
    lea rdx, tensor_name
    mov r8, new_data
    mov r9, data_size
    call UnifiedHotpatchManager_RegisterPatch
    mov patch_id, eax
    
    ; Apply byte-level patch
    lea rcx, tensor_name
    mov rdx, new_data
    mov r8, data_size
    call byte_level_hotpatcher_apply
    
    ; Update model memory in dual-engine manager
    mov rcx, g_dual_engine
    lea rdx, tensor_name
    call RawrXD_DualEngineManager_UpdateTensor
    
    ; Log success with patch_id for rollback
    lea rcx, szTensorPatched
    mov edx, patch_id
    call asm_log_fmt
    
    ret
rawrxd_hotpatch_tensor_live endp

; ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
; AGENTIC OPTIMIZATION ENABLER
; ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
rawrxd_enable_agentic_optimization proc
    mov rcx, g_state.feature_flags
    or rcx, (1 shl FEATURE_AGENTIC_OPTIMIZATION)
    mov g_state.feature_flags, rcx
    
    mov rcx, g_agent_orchestrator
    call RawrXD_AgenticPatchOrchestrator_Enable
    
    call asm_log "Agentic optimization enabled", ASM_LOG_INFO
    ret
rawrxd_enable_agentic_optimization endp

; ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
; NOTIFICATION HELPERS
; ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
rawrxd_notify_agents proc
    mov rcx, g_agent_orchestrator
    call RawrXD_AgenticPatchOrchestrator_NotifyCommandExecuted
    ret
rawrxd_notify_agents endp

; ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
; CLEANUP & GRACEFUL SHUTDOWN
; ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
rawrxd_cleanup proc
    call asm_log "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════", ASM_LOG_WARN
    call asm_log "RawrXD LazyInit: SHUTDOWN INITIATED", ASM_LOG_WARN
    call asm_log "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════", ASM_LOG_WARN
    
    ; Signal shutdown to agent thread
    .if g_shutdown_event != NULL
        invoke SetEvent, g_shutdown_event
    .endif
    
    ; Wait for agent thread to exit (max 5 seconds)
    .if g_agent_thread_handle != NULL
        invoke WaitForSingleObject, g_agent_thread_handle, 5000
        invoke CloseHandle, g_agent_thread_handle
    .endif
    
    ; Destroy managers (reverse init order)
    .if g_patch_manager != NULL
        mov rcx, g_patch_manager
        call UnifiedHotpatchManager_Destroy
    .endif
    
    .if g_dual_engine != NULL
        mov rcx, g_dual_engine
        call RawrXD_DualEngineManager_Destroy
    .endif
    
    .if g_agent_orchestrator != NULL
        mov rcx, g_agent_orchestrator
        call RawrXD_AgenticPatchOrchestrator_Destroy
    .endif
    
    .if g_puppeteer != NULL
        mov rcx, g_puppeteer
        call agentic_puppeteer_destroy
    .endif
    
    .if g_shutdown_event != NULL
        invoke CloseHandle, g_shutdown_event
    .endif
    
    ; Final utility cleanup
    call asm_memory_cleanup
    call asm_sync_cleanup
    call asm_log_cleanup
    
    call asm_log "Shutdown complete", ASM_LOG_INFO
    ret
rawrxd_cleanup endp

; ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
; DLL ENTRY POINT (For Hot-Injection Capability)
; ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
DllMain proc hInstance:qword, reason:dword, reserved:qword
```

```asm
; SYSTEM SPECIFICATION DETECTION
; ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
rawrxd_detect_system_specs proc
    LOCAL mem_status:MEMORYSTATUSEX
    
    mov mem_status.dwLength, sizeof MEMORYSTATUSEX
    lea rcx, mem_status
    call GlobalMemoryStatusEx
    
    ; Convert bytes to GB
    mov rax, mem_status.ullTotalPhys
    shr rax, 30                     ; / 1024^3
    mov g_state.total_ram_gb, rax
    
    mov rax, mem_status.ullAvailPhys
    shr rax, 30
    mov g_state.available_ram_gb, rax
    
    ; Detect CPU cores
    mov eax, 1
    cpuid
    shr ebx, 16                     ; EBX[23:16] = logical processors
    and ebx, 0FFh
    
    lea rcx, szSystemSpec
    call asm_log
    
    ret
rawrxd_detect_system_specs endp

        addr RawrXD_AgenticPatchOrchestrator_MainLoop, \
        g_agent_orchestrator, 0, addr thread_id
    
    mov g_agent_thread_handle, rax
    .if rax == NULL
        call asm_log "FATAL: Agent thread creation failed", ASM_LOG_ERROR
        jmp rawrxd_cleanup_and_exit
    .endif
    
    ; Set thread priority to below normal (background optimization)
    invoke SetThreadPriority, rax, THREAD_PRIORITY_BELOW_NORMAL
    ret
rawrxd_spawn_agentic_thread endp

rawrxd_agentic_main_loop proc
    LOCAL cmd_buffer[256]:byte

    ; Main event loop (production daemon)

        call rawrxd_check_for_commands

        call RawrXD_AgenticPatchOrchestrator_Pulse

        inc tokens_generated
        .if tokens_generated == 100
            call asm_log "Agentic pulse: System optimal", ASM_LOG_DEBUG
            mov tokens_generated, 0
        .endif
    .endw
    
    ret

    jge @F

    .if rax == NULL

        mov g_state.last_error_code, ERROR_MODEL_LOAD_FAILED

    .endif

    mov rcx, g_patch_manager

    call UnifiedHotpatchManager_ApplyPendingPatches

    mov rdx, g_state.current_engine

    call RawrXD_DualEngineManager_HotSwitch
    
    mov g_state.current_engine, dl
    
    ; Release patch window
    mov rcx, g_patch_manager

rawrxd_hotpatch_tensor_live proc

    LOCAL patch_id:dword

    ret

    mov patch_id, eax
    
    ; Apply byte-level patch

    mov rcx, g_dual_engine
    lea rdx, tensor_name
    call RawrXD_DualEngineManager_UpdateTensor
    
    ; Log success with patch_id for rollback
    lea rcx, szTensorPatched
    mov edx, patch_id
    call asm_log_fmt

rawrxd_hotpatch_tensor_live endp
```

```asm
    cpuid

    lea rcx, szSystemSpec
    call asm_log

    ; Update model memory in dual-engine manager
    mov rcx, g_dual_engine
    lea rdx, tensor_name
    call RawrXD_DualEngineManager_UpdateTensor
    
    ; Log success with patch_id for rollback
    lea rcx, szTensorPatched
    mov edx, patch_id
    call asm_log_fmt
    
    ret
rawrxd_hotpatch_tensor_live endp

; ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
; AGENTIC OPTIMIZATION ENABLER
; ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
rawrxd_enable_agentic_optimization proc
    mov rcx, g_state.feature_flags
    or rcx, (1 shl FEATURE_AGENTIC_OPTIMIZATION)
    mov g_state.feature_flags, rcx
    
    mov rcx, g_agent_orchestrator
    call RawrXD_AgenticPatchOrchestrator_Enable
    
    call asm_log "Agentic optimization enabled", ASM_LOG_INFO
    ret
rawrxd_enable_agentic_optimization endp

; ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
; CLEANUP & GRACEFUL SHUTDOWN
; ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
rawrxd_cleanup proc
    call asm_log "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════", ASM_LOG_WARN
    call asm_log "RawrXD LazyInit: SHUTDOWN INITIATED", ASM_LOG_WARN
    call asm_log "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════", ASM_LOG_WARN
    
    ; Signal shutdown to agent thread
    .if g_shutdown_event != NULL
        invoke SetEvent, g_shutdown_event
    .endif
    
    ; Wait for agent thread to exit (max 5 seconds)
    .if g_agent_thread_handle != NULL
        invoke WaitForSingleObject, g_agent_thread_handle, 5000
        invoke CloseHandle, g_agent_thread_handle
    .endif
    
    ; Destroy managers (reverse init order)
    .if g_patch_manager != NULL
        mov rcx, g_patch_manager
        call UnifiedHotpatchManager_Destroy
    .endif
    
    .if g_dual_engine != NULL
        mov rcx, g_dual_engine
        call RawrXD_DualEngineManager_Destroy
    .endif
    
    .if g_agent_orchestrator != NULL
        mov rcx, g_agent_orchestrator
        call RawrXD_AgenticPatchOrchestrator_Destroy
    .endif
    
    .if g_puppeteer != NULL
        mov rcx, g_puppeteer
        call agentic_puppeteer_destroy
    .endif
    
    .if g_shutdown_event != NULL
        invoke CloseHandle, g_shutdown_event
    .endif
    
    ; Final utility cleanup
    call asm_memory_cleanup
    call asm_sync_cleanup
    call asm_log_cleanup
    
    call asm_log "Shutdown complete", ASM_LOG_INFO
    ret
rawrxd_cleanup endp
```
